explanation: The response correctly identifies compute-bound as the bottleneck with high confidence, cites specific metric values (arithmetic intensity exceeding the A10G ridge point of 62 FLOP/byte, 12,288 FLOPs per thread, 8192 bytes loaded) and code patterns (REUSE_ITERS=32 loop), and correctly attributes the bottleneck to the inflated FP32 compute rather than the tiled memory loads (the misleading signal).
